enable_monitoring.description: Indicates whether detailed monitoring is enabled for the instance. When true, detailed monitoring is enabled.

iam_instance_profile.description: The name or the Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the instance profile associated with the IAM role for the instance.

image_id.description: The ID of the Amazon Machine Image (AMI) to use for the instance.

instance_type.description: The type of instance to start, such as t2.micro or m5.large.

placement_tenancy.description: The tenancy of the instance, which can be 'default' for shared tenancy or 'dedicated' for single-tenant hardware.

security_groups.description: A set of security group names or IDs to associate with the instance.

spot_price.description: The maximum hourly price you're willing to pay for the Spot Instances.

user_data.description: The user data to provide when launching the instance, usually used for configuration scripts.

user_data_base64.description: The base64-encoded user data to provide when launching the instance.

ebs_block_device.description: Configuration for EBS block devices to attach to the instance.

ephemeral_block_device.description: Configuration for ephemeral block devices to attach to the instance.

root_block_device.description: Configuration for the root block device to attach to the instance.

name.description: The name of the launch configuration.

name_prefix.description: The prefix name of the launch configuration.
